pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_task.sh) dynamically creates the project with name 'Orion Avionics'
Task setup script (setup_task.sh) dynamically creates the source version with name 'v2.4-stable'
Task setup script (setup_task.sh) dynamically creates the target version with name 'v2.5-beta'

privileged_info_summary: The data is entirely synthetic and created during the task setup. The Redmine project 'Orion Avionics' is dynamically populated with 'v2.4-stable' and 'v2.5-beta' versions, and issues are seeded using a ruby script running on the Redmine server.
